productName: Ooowee - 1g Hydrocarbon Concentrate - Ooowee - Late Bloomer - 1g
description: A potent hybrid butane hash oil from Late Bloomer, extracted in a sealed closed-loop system by licensed techs and carefully purged to lab-tested purity. Potent, clean, and lab-tested — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
